fields.name: Name
fields.allowParticipantChoice: Allow Customer To Choose Team Member

bookingMatchMode.MatchOrCreateLead: Match by Email, Else Create Lead

timezoneMode.BrowserWithManualOverride: Auto-Detect Browser Timezone With Manual Override

tooltips.roundRobinEnabled: When enabled for team-owned schedulers, meetings can be assigned automatically to the next available team member.
tooltips.allowParticipantChoice: When enabled for team-owned schedulers, customers can select a specific team member. Off by default.
tooltips.bookingMatchMode: Match by email first. If there is no CRM match, create a new Lead.
tooltips.timezoneMode: Public booking should detect the visitor timezone automatically and still allow a manual override.
tooltips.overlapPolicy: Busy conflicts should show the conflicting event and require explicit confirmation before an overlap is allowed. Free or tentative events may be ignored where provider data supports it.
tooltips.defaultCalendarMode: Starts as a plain calendar event. A connected Google or Outlook calendar can later be promoted to the default.
